name: Stree Shakti Package
description: Loan up to ₹25 lakhs for women entrepreneurs at reduced interest rates. Concession of 0.5% on interest.

name: Mudra Loan - Mahila Udyam Nidhi
description: Micro loans from ₹50,000 to ₹10 lakhs for women-owned small businesses. No collateral needed.

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: High-interest savings scheme (8.2% p.a.) for girl child below 10 years. Tax benefits under 80C.

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
description: Welfare services for the girl child — education support, health, and financial empowerment.

name: Mahila Samridhi Yojana
description: Savings and micro-credit scheme for rural women. Encourages habit of saving with incentives.

name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana
description: Zero balance bank account with RuPay debit card, ₹1 lakh accident insurance, ₹30,000 life insurance.

name: Annpurna Scheme
description: Loan up to ₹50,000 for women in food catering business. Repay in 3 years.

name: Mahila Shakti Kendra
description: Community participation and empowerment of rural women through skill development and employment.

name: Support to Training and Employment (STEP)
description: Skills training for women above 16 years in agriculture, textiles, handicrafts, and more.

name: Rashtriya Mahila Kosh (RMK)
description: Micro-credit to poor women for income-generating activities at very low interest rates.

name: PM Kaushal Vikas Yojana (Women)
description: Free skill training for women in 300+ job roles. Certification and placement assistance.

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya (Women)
description: Placement-linked skill training for rural women aged 15-35 years.

name: Swayam Siddha
description: Self Help Group scheme linking women to credit, income generation, and awareness programs.

name: Swarna Jayanti Shahri Rozgar Yojana
description: Urban employment and self-employment for women below poverty line through SHGs.

name: Mahila E-Haat
description: Online marketing platform for women entrepreneurs to sell products directly to buyers.

name: Stand Up India
description: Loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore for women SC/ST entrepreneurs to set up greenfield enterprises.

name: PM SVANidhi (Women Street Vendors)
description: Working capital loans of ₹10,000 to ₹50,000 for women street vendors. Digital payment incentives.

name: CGTMSE for Women
description: Credit guarantee scheme — women entrepreneurs get loans up to ₹2 crore without collateral.

name: Udyogini Scheme
description: Subsidized loans up to ₹3 lakhs for women in 88 business categories. SC/ST women get full subsidy.

name: Nari Shakti Puraskar
description: Annual award of ₹2 lakh for women/institutions doing exceptional work for women empowerment.
